headline: Febreze Transforms Kitchen Funk into Freshness with NEW Febreze TRASH
summary: CINCINNATI, April 23, 2026--The freshness experts at Febreze are setting their sights on the home’s most notorious odor offender – the kitchen trash can – with their latest innovation. Today, the Brand unveiled the NEW Febreze TRASH Odor Fighter, a compact yet powerful device engineered for high-performance freshness. Formulated to reduce up to 99% of common trash odors, this new kitchen must-have will be every garbage can’s and nose’s new best friend.
